---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that ru_pulse can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

What should ru_pulse do? API sketch welcome.

## Alternatives

What workarounds exist? What other tools solve this, and why aren't they sufficient?

## Implementation

Would you contribute this? (yes / yes with guidance / no, requesting maintainer)

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues.
